name: @devchitchat/chat
description: A small chat app. p2p video and screenshare.

scripts.create-secrets: kubectl create secret generic chat-web-vapid --from-env-file=.env --namespace=${KUBE_NAMESPACE:-default} --dry-run=client -o yaml | kubectl apply -f -
scripts.local-deploy: kubectl config use-context ${KUBE_CONTEXT:-k3d-local} && kubectl apply -f charts/web/templates/deployment.yaml -n ${KUBE_NAMESPACE:-default}
scripts.deploy-backup: kubectl config use-context ${KUBE_CONTEXT:-k3d-local} && helm upgrade --install chat-web charts/web -f charts/web/values.local.yaml -n ${KUBE_NAMESPACE:-default}
scripts.backup-now: kubectl config use-context ${KUBE_CONTEXT:-k3d-local} && kubectl create job --from=cronjob/chat-backup chat-backup-$(date +%s) -n ${KUBE_NAMESPACE:-default}
